testcase.name: test_disabled_ring_accepts_oor_width

failure.message: AssertionError: ring_enabled=false with rw=0.5 rejected: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"greater_than_equal","loc":["body","ring_width_mm"],"msg":"Input should be greater than or equal to 1","input":0.5,"ctx":{"ge":1.0},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/greater assert 422 == 200 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter136_1_ring_api.py:202: in test_disabled_ring_accepts_oor_width assert r.status_code == 200, ( E AssertionError: ring_enabled=false with rw=0.5 rejected: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"greater_than_equal","loc":["body","ring_width_mm"],"msg":"Input should be greater than or equal to 1","input":0.5,"ctx":{"ge":1.0},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/greater E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
